goal: ker.carrier = z.carrier and forall(x0: M) { ker.contains(x0) = z.contains(x0) }

p.c: not forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ ker = x0 ∈ z } or z.carrier != ker.carrier
z.carrier != ker.carrier or exists(k0: M) { k0 ∈ ker != k0 ∈ z }
exists(k0: M) { k0 ∈ ker != k0 ∈ z }
let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ z != w0 ∈ ker }
ker.carrier = z.carrier and forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ ker = x0 ∈ z }
(forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ ker = x0 ∈ z } = true)

goal: module_hom_kernel[R, M, M](module_hom_identity[R, M](m)) = zero_submodule[R, M](m)
img.carrier = full.carrier and forall(x0: M) { img.contains(x0) = full.contains(x0) }

p.c: not forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ img = x0 ∈ full } or full.carrier != img.carrier
full.carrier != img.carrier or exists(k0: M) { k0 ∈ img != k0 ∈ full }
exists(k0: M) { k0 ∈ img != k0 ∈ full }
let w0: M satisfy { w0 ∈ full != w0 ∈ img }
img.carrier = full.carrier and forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ img = x0 ∈ full }
(forall(x0: M) { x0 ∈ img = x0 ∈ full } = true)

goal: module_hom_image[R, M, M](module_hom_identity[R, M](m)) = full_submodule[R, M](m)
